task:
[Read from: /home/adnan/Projects/Inventory-Flow/plan.md, /home/adnan/Projects/Inventory-Flow/progress.md]

Act as senior backend/security reviewer. Inspect the existing .NET identity, EF persistence, refresh-token model, API configuration, and tests. Do not edit files. Determine whether an authentication/JWT + refresh-token rotation slice is the safest immediate next increment. Report concrete gaps, required endpoints/contracts, secure implementation constraints, tests, and any blockers with file references.

## Acceptance Contract
Acceptance level: attested
Completion is not accepted from prose alone. End with a structured acceptance report.

Criteria:
- criterion-1: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

Required evidence: review-findings, residual-risks

Finish with a fenced JSON block tagged `acceptance-report` in this shape:
Use empty arrays when no items apply; array fields contain strings unless object entries are shown.
`criteriaSatisfied[].status` must be exactly one of: satisfied, not-satisfied, not-applicable.
`commandsRun[].result` must be exactly one of: passed, failed, not-run.
`manualNotes` and `notes` are optional strings; an empty string means no note and does not satisfy `manual-notes` evidence.
```acceptance-report
{
  "criteriaSatisfied": [
    {
      "id": "criterion-1",
      "status": "satisfied",
      "evidence": "specific proof"
    }
  ],
  "changedFiles": [
    "src/file.ts"
  ],
  "testsAddedOrUpdated": [
    "test/file.test.ts"
  ],
  "commandsRun": [
    {
      "command": "command",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "short result"
    }
  ],
  "validationOutput": [
    "validation output or concise summary"
  ],
  "residualRisks": [
    "none"
  ],
  "noStagedFiles": true,
  "diffSummary": "short description of the diff",
  "reviewFindings": [
    "blocker: file.ts:12 - issue found, or no blockers"
  ],
  "manualNotes": "anything else the parent should know"
}
```

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Concrete severity-tagged findings cite Program.cs, InfrastructureServiceCollectionExtensions.cs, RefreshToken.cs, EF configurations, migration behavior, integration fixture, and frontend API client.

commandsRun.summary: Build succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Exited successfully with no formatting changes required.
No tracked diff whitespace errors; review was read-only.

validationOutput: Authentication is not currently implemented: no JWT bearer registration, authentication middleware, auth endpoints, or JWT configuration.
Refresh-token storage exists but lacks family/replay lineage and concurrency protection required for secure rotation.
Existing integration tests do not connect to or migrate a real database.
residualRisks: A stolen access token remains valid until its short expiry because JWT access tokens are stateless.
Production data-protection keys need encryption at rest and access control.
Cross-origin refresh-cookie use requires an explicit CSRF and credentialed-CORS design.
childReport.diffSummary: Read-only security review; no tracked files changed.
reviewFindings: high: backend/src/InventoryFlow.Api/Program.cs:18,49 - authorization exists without JWT authentication registration or UseAuthentication middleware.

high: backend/src/InventoryFlow.Domain/Entities/RefreshToken.cs:19-92 and backend/src/InventoryFlow.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/RefreshTokenConfiguration.cs:16-34 - token model lacks family/replay lineage and concurrency protection.
high: backend/tests/InventoryFlow.IntegrationTests/Api/InventoryFlowApiFactory.cs:25-30 - integration fixture uses a placeholder SQL connection and current tests do not exercise persistence.
high: backend/src/InventoryFlow.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection/InfrastructureServiceCollectionExtensions.cs:38-40 - persisted data-protection keys have no explicit at-rest protection.

medium: backend/src/InventoryFlow.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection/InfrastructureServiceCollectionExtensions.cs:44 - unique-email policy lacks a corresponding unique normalized-email database index.

medium: backend/src/InventoryFlow.Api/Program.cs:23-40 and frontend/src/lib/api-client.ts:5-10 - shared rate limit and non-credentialed CORS/client configuration are insufficient for browser refresh-cookie auth.
childReport.manualNotes: Root plan.md and progress.md were absent; .project/PROGRESS.md and README.md were reviewed instead.
